# Chapter 8: Compilers and interpreters  (~100 pp)
- 8.1 Lexing and parsing (15) · 8.2 ASTs and intermediate representations (15) · 8.3 Type checking and analysis (15) · 8.4 Code generation and optimisation passes (18) · 8.5 Just-in-time compilation (12) · 8.6 The compiler as design tool: DSLs (15) · 8.7 Failure section: undefined-behaviour optimisations, ICEs, generated-code bugs (10)
